title: Curse Slayer
description: There Once Was A Sword That Could Kill ANYONE Or Any Curse.
body:
When You Rename A Sword "Curse Slayer" You Will Get A Purple Cool Looking Sword

The pack requires OptiFine, which can be downloaded here:
https://optifine.net/home

Or, if you're playing on Fabric, this pack requires CIT Resewn:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn
